message:
fix(cli/doctor): compute pending ack count before thread filtering and fix lifetime parsing

Two fixes in the doctor CLI:

1. Agent mail pane: pending_ack_count was computed AFTER thread_filter_mode
   was applied, meaning filtered-out messages weren't counted. Moved the
   count computation before filtering so it reflects global ack obligations
   regardless of the active thread filter.

2. Lock analysis sanitizer: Rust lifetime annotations ('a, 'static, '_)
   were incorrectly entering char-literal mode, which could mask lock
   call patterns on the rest of the line. Now distinguishes lifetimes
   (tick + lowercase/underscore, no closing quote) from char literals
   (tick + any char + closing tick) and blanks them without suppressing
   subsequent analysis.

3. Cargo.toml package name parser: was using parse_string_array_literal()
   for a scalar string field (name = "crate_name"), which always set
   malformed=true because it expected bracket syntax. Now parses the
   scalar directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
